title: Queenmore Dog Fleece Jumper Cosy Dog Vest Fleece Dog Coat Pullover Dog Jacket With Leash Hole, Warm Winter Dog Coats Cold Weather Doggy Dachshund Sweaters For Small Dogs, Rose, XS
features: Warm and Cosy Fleece Vest for Dogs: Keep your puppy snug all winter long with our fleece dog vest, made from durable, soft, and warm micro-elastic polyester. Gentle on sensitive skin, it provides all-day warmth without harming your dog's skin

Innovative and Practical Design: Our dog winter jumper features an easy-to-wear pullover style with an adjustable wide abdominal range, ensuring a perfect fit for dogs of all sizes. A convenient leash hole on the back allows for easy walks, making it both functional and comfortable

Stylish and Fashionable: The Queenmore dog sweatshirt vest is adorned with stylish decorative ribbons on the back, adding a touch of fashion. Ideal for winter outings, holidays, or daily wear, this soft and chic fleece vest is also a perfect birthday gift for your furry friends

Easy to Wash and Maintain: Enjoy hassle-free care with our machine-washable dog jumpers. Crafted from high-quality materials, these vests resist shrinking after washing, ensuring long-term durability. Available in sizes XS to L, they fit small to medium dogs such as chihuahua, dachshund, French bulldog, etc, and even your adorable kittens

Classic and Durable Fleece Design : Made from solid soft fleece with exquisite craftsmanship, this winter dog jumper stands out for its unique style and long-lasting wear. Prepare your pet for winter adventures with this classic and warm apparel
description: Queenmore Small Dog Sweater, Soft Fleece Vest Pullover Dog Jacket with Leash Hole, Warm Winter Dog Coats Cold Weather Doggy Dachshund Sweaters for Small Dogs Cats Boy or Girl
